hooks.command: code_t=$(git log -1 --format="%ct" 2>/dev/null); doc_t=$(git log -1 --format="%ct" -- CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$code_t" ] && [ "${code_t:-0}" -gt "${doc_t:-0}" ] && touch .git/claude-md-stale || true

if [ -f .git/claude-md-stale ]; then rm .git/claude-md-stale; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"CLAUDE.md is behind code commits — update it before doing anything else this turn."}}'; fi
